verdict: NULL — no stratification resonance from memory
interpretation: R(Ri) is flat at 1.0006 across all Ri. The colored-FDT OU memory (bs_tau=0.05) does not create a melt enhancement hump. Measured tau_mem (3.17e-3) is 16x shorter than set bs_tau because spatial averaging of N^3=262144 independent OU processes decorrelates the mean-field force much faster than any individual point (CLT effect). The product tau_mem*N_BV never exceeds 0.001, far below the 2*pi resonance threshold. The FDT variance constraint pins the instantaneous forcing amplitude identically for white and colored, so the only difference (temporal coloring) washes out of the time-averaged melt flux. This is consistent with Direction A's null: memory recolors but does not reshape.
